label: 5676 Repealed. , , ]Pub. L. 94–455, title XIX, § 1905(b)(1)(A)90 Stat. 1822Oct. 4, 1976
notes: Section, added , , , set out the penalties for selling, removing, or receiving beer without a proper stamp or device, withdrawing beer from an improperly stamped container or without destroying the stamp, and counterfeiting stamps or devices or trafficking in used stamps or devices, and provided for the forfeiture of unstamped containers, and the penalties for removal or defacement of stamps, devices, or labels.Pub. L. 85–859, title II, § 20172 Stat. 1408Sept. 2, 1958

A prior section 5676, , , consisted of provisions similar to those comprising this section prior to repeal by , prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 697Pub. L. 94–455Pub. L. 85–859

Effective Date of RepealRepeal effective on first day of first month which begins more than 90 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 1976 Amendment note under .Oct. 4, 1976section 1905(d) of Pub. L. 94–455section 5005 of this title
